data.title: Tarkett's total voting rights and shares as of November 30th, 2025 in Paris, France to be disclosed on December 5th.
data.description: As of November 30, 2025, the total number of voting rights and shares in Tarkett's share capital in Paris, France was revealed. The data provides insight into the company's ownership structure and the level of control each shareholder may have in the decision-making process. This information is crucial for investors, regulators, and other stakeholders to gauge the distribution of power within Tarkett. It showcases the transparency and accountability of the company in disclosing key financial details for public scrutiny and analysis.

data.title: Post-Fusaka upgrade, Ethereum's validation drops by 25% as Prysm bug risks finality loss; network 9% away.
data.description: Ethereum recently experienced a significant 25% decrease in voting participation following a bug in the Prysm consensus client after the Fusaka upgrade. This drop in participation brought the network to within just 9% of losing finality.

data.title: Global Tourism Economy Forum in Harbin, China on Dec 15-17, 2025, focuses on new productive forces driving tourism economy.
data.description: The Global Tourism Economy Forum (GTEF), a renowned international platform focused on fostering sustainable growth in the global tourism industry, is set to organize its upcoming event in HARBIN, China on December 5, 2025. The forum aims to explore innovative strategies to enhance the tourism economy and is expected to attract a large number of prominent industry leaders, experts, and stakeholders. Through discussions, presentations, and networking opportunities, GTEF endeavors to drive positive changes and boost productivity in the tourism sector on a global scale.

data.title: Mama's Creations (NASDAQ: MAMA) to report Q3 loss of 1 cent/share, revenue estimated at $43.21 million, up from $31.52 million last year.
data.description: Mama's Creations, Inc., listed as MAMA on NASDAQ, is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Monday, December 8th after market close. Analysts anticipate a downturn for the East Rutherford, New Jersey company, expecting a loss of 1 cent per share compared to a profit of 1 cent per share in the same period last year. Revenue projections stand at $43.21 million, a significant increase from $31.52 million in the previous year. These figures are sourced from Benzinga Pro. Find more details on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Zoomlion named one of 15 top smart factories at World Intelligent Manufacturing Conference on Nov 27, 2025.
data.description: In Changsha, China, on December 5, 2025, Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. (1157.HK) was recognized as one of the initial 15 top-tier smart factories during the 2025 World Intelligent Manufacturing Conference held on November 27, 2025. This recognition highlights Zoomlion's pioneering efforts in the industry.

data.title: WSPN launches White-Label Stablecoin Solution for enterprises to issue branded stablecoins; revolutionizing the industry.
data.description: In Tortola, British Virgin Islands, on December 5, 2025, the Worldwide Stablecoin Payment Network (WSPN) presented its latest innovation. The White-Label Stablecoin Solution is now available for adoption by businesses and financial entities. This solution, developed by WSPN, offers advanced stablecoin infrastructure to users. This launch signifies a significant move in the financial technology sector, allowing enterprises and financial institutions to implement this cutting-edge solution.

data.title: New series "Keywords to Understand China" aims to bridge cultural differences, with a focus on global civilization.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Beijing, a report was released regarding the multilingual book series called "Keywords to Understand China: Global Civilization Initiative." This series is part of the broader "Keywords to Understand China" program and aims to foster understanding across cultures. The books have been successful in bridging cultural gaps and have been a key element in facilitating global communication. The initiative has received positive feedback and has contributed significantly to promoting awareness and understanding of China on a global scale.

data.title: Chery collaborates with 2025 Asian Youth Para Games in Dubai to boost global sports; key dignitaries present at the signing ceremony.
data.description: In Dubai on December 4th, 2025, Chery conducted a signing ceremony with the 2025 Asian Youth Para Games (AYPG) organizing committee. The key attendees included Mr. Zhu Shaodong, Executive Vice President of Chery International. The event aimed to establish collaboration for the upcoming AYPG.

data.title: IBM and Bayer 04 Leverkusen collaborate on AI, cloud systems and data analytics to improve game analysis, cutting manual work.
data.description: IBM and Bayer 04 Leverkusen have joined forces to develop innovative solutions incorporating advanced AI technologies, scalable cloud systems, and data-driven analytics. This collaboration aims to streamline manual analyses and enhance operational efficiency. The combined data and video solution is projected to significantly reduce processing time and boost performance.

data.title: CoinEx marks 8th anniversary with global events. Celebrations include offline activities in countries, connecting with users.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, CoinEx, a well-known global cryptocurrency exchange platform, initiated a range of in-person celebratory events in various countries and regions to commemorate its 8th year in operation. The purpose of these events is to celebrate the significant milestone with users and foster community engagement.

data.title: Aker BP and Equinor's gas and condensate discovery in North Sea estimates 30-110M barrels of oil equivalent.
data.description: In LYSAKER, Norway, on December 5, 2025, Aker BP and Equinor announced a noteworthy gas and condensate find in the Lofn and Langemann wells in the Sleipner region of the North Sea. The discovery is anticipated to yield a range of 30 to 110 million barrels of oil equivalent.

data.title: The Ademi Firm is investigating Synchronoss Technologies Inc. for possible fiduciary duty breaches in its transaction with Lumine Group.
data.description: Investigation into potential breaches of fiduciary duty and legal violations by Synchronoss (NASDAQ: SNCR) in its recent deal with Lumine Group is underway by The Ademi Firm in Milwaukee as of Dec. 5, 2025. Individuals interested in participating in the investigation or acquiring more information can access details by following the provided link.

data.title: Assa Abloy acquires Sargent and Greenleaf in the US, a high-security locking solutions manufacturer.
data.description: In a recent development, ASSA ABLOY, based in Stockholm, has successfully purchased Sargent and Greenleaf, a reputable American company specializing in crafting high-security mechanical and electronic locking systems and safe hardware. The acquisition solidifies ASSA ABLOY's position in the market as a leader in this sector. The deal, finalized on December 5, 2025, signifies a significant move in the industry in terms of growth and expansion. The exact financial figures of the acquisition were not disclosed.

data.title: Wall Street analysts adjust Victoria's Secret predictions before Q3 earnings. Expect loss of 59 cents per share with $1.41 billion revenue, an increase from $1.35 billion last year. Shares fall by 2.2% to $41.57. Find more on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Victoria's Secret & Co. (NYSE: VSCO) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Friday, Dec. 5. Analysts are predicting a quarterly loss of 59 cents per share compared to a loss of 50 cents per share a year ago. The consensus estimate for the company's quarterly revenue stands at $1.41 billion, up from $1.35 billion in the previous year. In the second quarter, the company surpassed expectations with its earnings and sales. On Thursday, shares of Victoria's Secret dropped by 2.2% to close at $41.57. For detailed analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where information is categorized by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, and rating. More details are available on Benzinga.com.
